title: PixelBy: Foods (Beta)
description: PixelBy: Foods adds 3D and animated foods to minecraft.
body:
![PixelBy: Foods Beta Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7714d511e58e07551e78e7cdc7d9d86f11829463.png)

![About PixelBy: Foods Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/492de67d7d35e3c16bf67ae334455c43b5e9b93b.png)

PixelBy: Foods is a Resource Pack that adds new 3D models for (not yet) all vanilla foods and adds **eating animations** to them. 

The main goal of this resource pack is to **ThreeDe-rize** all the foods in Minecraft. This pack was designed to be used **alongside** my other PixelBy resource pack, make sure to check [PixelBy: Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelby)!

**_PixelBy: Foods is currently in beta and many things will change. All feedback in our Discord is welcome!_**

![Header: Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc469800d0df2023d6b9170047f22f700f053afe.png)

- This pack was created by Landrozaum, a SaltyLight team member.
- Credits to Mojang AB. because almost 90% of the colors used in the models in this pack are from Minecraft textures.

![Header: Legal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcbe66840d96bc3f31c368a307f1a4eb681a65b4.png)

This digital item is intended solely for personal use. Redistribution of this Digital Product, including uploading it to other platforms, is prohibited.
